PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for (petitioner) Gene Marchi.

The Court asked Ms. Robello if she had anything additional to report. Ms. Robello stated that this was initially filed as part of the litigation, that they had not located the original will, that there has been a settlement and that they need to secure the property in Texas as part of the estate. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with will annexed (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Jan-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number PES-12-295479 Estate of Ben Kelly.

Appearance: Seth Skootsky for Stanley Kelly. Emilie Calhoun for Francene Kelly Kennedy. Lawrence Siracusa for Rena Harel. Anthony Kelly and his wife were present.

The Court and all counsel have discussion prior to calling the case. The Court asked the parties to get a tolling agreement and that to consider the loans as part of the trust and have it consider in the trust.

At the callling of the calendar, all parties returned to court with an agreement to a tolling agreement with one note at issue with Stanley Kelly and his wife in the Exemption Trust. Other notes can remain status quo. Status of tolling agreement is set on July 17, 2012 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 in case number PTR-11-295040, the Exemption Trust . Petition for Probate of Will in case number PES-12-295479 and Petition for Letter of Administration in case number PES-12-295030 are continued to January 8, 2013 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Demurrer in civil action is set without prejudice to re-calendaring on an earlier date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Lelu.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2012 Continued To Jul-03-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Continued To Jul-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: SEE WORD MINUTES.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Continued To Feb-01-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case numbers PTR-10-293378 The Juanita B. Kelley Survivor's Trust and PTR-11-295040 The Kelley Family Exemption Trust.

Appearances: Seth Skootsky for Anthony Kelley, Reginald Kelley and Stanley Kelley. Lawrence Siracusa for Rena Harel. John Rueppel for Brian Carideo. Emilie Calhoun for and with Francene Kennedy. Nelson Wild Guardian Ad Litem for Kellyanne Kelley. Collin Kelley (Creditor) also present.

The Court heard oral argument. Ms. Harel's accounting petition in the Survivor's Trust (293378) was taken under submission. The Court will not address the funeral in the accounting. The Motion for Reconsideration in the Survivor's Trust was denied. Mr. Skootsky is to prepare the order. All of the remaining matters were continued to February 1, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Motion to Strike on calendar for January 4, 2012 was also continued to February 1, 2012 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will send the Parties to a settlement conference, will obtain a name of a Judge and select a tentative date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Easteller Bruihl, CSR#3077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
